description: Implement src/tools/safety.ts for 2 tools. diff_cem: calls diffCem handler, formats breaking vs non-breaking output clearly. check_breaking_changes: NEW — runs diffCem across ALL components returned by listAllComponents, aggregates results, outputs per-component summary with emoji indicators. Correctly handles new components (flag as NEW not BREAKING). Write tests FIRST for the aggregation logic — verify a mix of breaking, non-breaking, and new components is formatted correctly. The diffCem handler is already tested; these tests cover the aggregation and formatting layer.
title: Safety tools — diff_cem, check_breaking_changes
